title: Herbal Teas for Allergies: Top 10 Picks
description: Zingiber officinale tea, also known as ginger tea, has anti-inflammatory properties that can help with allergies. When we have an allergy, our body's immune system reacts to something harmless, like pollen or dust, by releasing chemicals that cause symptoms like sneezing, itching, and congestion. Ginger tea can help reduce inflammation in the body, which in turn can reduce these symptoms. It also has antihistamine properties, which can help block the release of histamine, the chemical ...
